subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Nembai tubishina tuno twa mpezho twatu majishimikila.
topics: (i). ‘Mwanyike apane kajo ku mwenyi uji na nzala’.
(ii). ‘Nsongwakazhi bamupa mali ku bansemi kabiji wabwezhe ne ashalapo’.
(iii). ‘Mwanyike muyanji utongan’a kimye kyonse kusukuulu ne kutapo maana ku
